no: WARNING: Red Skeleton places hostiles creatures near a Romantic Encounters character (The Essential End) [Northern Tales of the Sword Coast placeholder] same added spells [Stone of Askavar placeholder] tutu-bgt-and-bg-ee Shades of the Sword Coast. mod_installer: Large BG1 expansion with hundreds of creature and area patches. Triggers dialogue recompilation cascade when installed after many dialogue mods

conflicts.reason: Minor Firewine Ruins area script overlap. Install order dependent.
conflicts.source: tp2 analysis - only genuine technical overlap among SotSC conflicts. SotSC fj_are_structure sets offset 0x94 on AR1802, Indira may also assign area script, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both mods EXTEND_BOTTOM Thalantyr dialogue state 1 but use independent variables (SotSC: L#HIGKEQuest, Calling: CDBracerQuest). Should coexist with correct install order.
conflicts.myComps: #0 Shades of the Sword Coast - Expansion Pack for BGEE
conflicts.source: tp2 analysis of thecalling.tp2 Beta 2+ and SotSC dialogue/thalan.d, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both mods modify shared BG1 area scripts. Compatible if Dark Horizons is installed BEFORE SotSC (per SotSC readme). SotSC expects Dark Horizons changes to already be present.
Both mods modify shared BG1 area scripts. Compatible if Dark Horizons is installed BEFORE SotSC (per SotSC readme). SotSC expects Dark Horizons changes to already be present.

sum: Large BG1 quest mod adding new areas, quests, and encounters south of Baldur's Gate. Includes a new storyline involving the Shades and a dungeon complex.

co.n: Shades of the Sword Coast - Expansion Pack for BGEE
co.tp2n: Shades of the Sword Coast – Expansion Pack for BGEE
co.no: UPSTREAM BUG: SotSC/NoSoDFixes/SPIDSM0_.cre not found. SotSC.tph (line 7-8) references SPIDSM0_.cre (trailing underscore) but the actual file in SotSC/NoSoDFixes/ is spidsm01.cre (numeral 1, not underscore). Filename mismatch — the two names differ. The installed backup copy (from a prior working install) already uses the corrected name spidsm01.cre. Fix: rename NoSoDFixes/spidsm01.cre to SPIDSM0_.cre, or update SotSC.tph to reference spidsm01.cre.

in.t: Rename SotSC/NoSoDFixes/spidsm01.cre to SPIDSM0_.cre (upstream filename mismatch). Or use eet-mod-forge-patches #19.
